reports.description: Multiple trees were downed in Łódź and neighbouring areas, with the majority of damage occuring most likely during the passage of a convective cell with a small bowing segment visible on the radar (although it's speculative and not specified by the news source). Three cars, power lines and fences were damaged by falling trees and tree branches. Time was based on a radar data.
